name: Crazy Race
author: Poki
description: Crazy Race is a racing game where insane stunt jumps lead to massive scores! Pull off wild tricks, unlock a crazy collection of cars, and dominate classic races or test your survival skills in the chaotic Downhill Madness mode. Fast, flashy, and full of action, this is racing turned up to eleven. Ready for the ultimate thrill ride? How to play Crazy Race? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Reverse: S or the down arrow key Turn left or right: Use the A and D or left and right arrow keys Brake: the space bar Boost: Shift Who created Crazy Race? Crazy Race is created by Denis. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Crazy Race for free? You can play Crazy Race for free on Poki. Can I play Crazy Race on mobile devices and desktop? Crazy Race can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
